source: There is a bathtub ring on the river banks just south of Sacramento , the first visible sign of the rise and fall of the tides . source: Advertising Muslim group criticizes Burger King ad Des Moines , Iowa -- Burger King Corp . said it will modify a commercial airing on black radio stations to remove what some listeners may consider offensive content . A company spokesman said the hamburger chain will change the name of a coffeehouse poet in the spot who reads an ode to a Whopper bacon cheddar burger . In the original ad the person 's name was Rasheed -- to which the Council on American-Islamic Relations took offense . The Muslim group issued a press release noting that Islam prohibits the consumption of pork products . Burger King spokesman Robert Doughty told Dow Jones Newswires the ad will be re-recorded so that the poet will be introduced as " Willie . "
domestication:
广告穆斯林团体批评汉堡王广告

得梅因，爱荷华州——汉堡王公司表示，将修改在黑人广播电台播放的一则广告，移除一些听众可能认为冒犯的内容。公司发言人称，汉堡王将更改广告中一位咖啡馆诗人的名字，这位诗人朗诵了一首献给烟熏培根切达奶酪汉堡的诗歌。原来广告中这个人的名字叫拉希德，这让美国-伊斯兰关系委员会感到不满。这家穆斯林组织发表声明指出，伊斯兰教禁止食用猪肉制品。汉堡王发言人罗伯特·道蒂告诉道琼斯新闻社，广告将会重新录制，诗人会被介绍为“威利”。

source: At the same time that today 's pop-to-classical crossover artists are evidencing more ambition than the rock bands of days past ( Moody Blues , Procol Harum , Deep Purple ) that used an orchestra as a mere backdrop , the idea of classical music itself is being revised . It can be newer , more immediate and punchier , which is the philosophy of Sony Classical president Peter Gelb , the unofficial godfather of this movement .
domestication: 如今的流行与古典跨界艺术家们，野心可比过去的摇滚乐队（比如穆迪布鲁斯、普罗科尔·哈伦、深紫）大多了，那时的乐队不过是把管弦乐团当个背景用用。与此同时，古典音乐本身的概念也在被重新定义。它可以更新鲜、更贴近时代，更有冲击力。这正是索尼古典音乐公司总裁彼得·格里布所推崇的理念，他也是这场运动的非官方教父。

source: With the taboos broken , the sexual content of television reached a new high -- or low -- in the mid-1970 's . Amid the disillusion surrounding Watergate and the dissoluteness of the disco era , Fred Silverman , then the programming guru at ABC , ushered in such " jigglefests " as " Three 's Company . " That phenomenally successful show , which ran from 1977 to 1984 , was essentially a reworking of classic bedroom farce ; virtually every joke sprang from the theoretically comedic situation of two women sharing an apartment with a lusty male roommate who had convinced the landlord that he was gay .

source: Obsession with star gazing has been a pop-culture mainstay for decades . But lately , the proliferation of outlets for such coverage seems unbridled . Cable news and entertainment shows keep multiplying alongside celebrity-gossip blogs , which have millions of fans . source: At breakneck speed , major airlines are expanding their use of small , cheaper-to-operate " regional " jets . The majors are using regional jets to replace slow turboprops and larger , less-efficient jets on some routes , and to launch service to new cities . Within 5 years , regional jets will account for large blocks of most major airlines ' fleets , and now regional airline pilots want their pay to reflect the growing role . The strike is being closely watched : Its outcome is likely to redefine the economics of flying regional jets for airlines , employees and passengers .

source: By listening to everything that is happening in your house , as these bots do , they learn how we think , live , work and play . They are gathering massive amounts of data about us . And that raises a dark side of this technology : The privacy risks and possible misuse by technology companies . Neither Amazon nor Google is forthcoming about what it is doing with all of the data it gathers and how it will protect us from hackers who exploit weaknesses in the infrastructure leading to its servers .
domestication: 这些机器人监听家里发生的一切，从中学习我们的思维方式、生活习惯、工作模式和娱乐方式。它们收集了关于我们大量的数据。而这背后，这项技术也有其阴暗面：隐私风险和技术公司可能的滥用。无论是亚马逊还是谷歌，对于它们收集的数据用在何处，如何保护我们免受利用系统漏洞攻击服务器的黑客侵害，都守口如瓶。

" That 's why nine-time Tony winner Tommy Tune ( who picked up two Tonys as director and choreographer of " Grand Hotel " ) persuaded her to star in the touring production . " Tommy feels that people who can not afford to come to New York should see Broadway shows on tour with Broadway stars . source: Google and Amazon have both opened up their devices to third-party developers - who in turn have added the abilities to order pizza , book tickets , turn on lights and make phone calls . We will soon see these bots connected to health and fitness devices so that they can help people devise better exercise regimens and remember to take their medicine . And they will control the dishwasher and the microwave , track what is left in the refrigerator and order an ambulance in a case of emergency .
domestication: 谷歌和亚马逊都向第三方开发者开放了他们的设备，这样一来，这些设备就能帮我们订披萨、订票、开灯、打电话了。很快，这些智能助手还会连接到健康和健身设备，帮助人们制定更好的锻炼计划，提醒吃药。它们还能控制洗碗机和微波炉，监控冰箱里还剩什么，紧急情况下还能叫救护车。
foreignization: 谷歌和亚马逊都已向第三方开发者开放了他们的设备——这些开发者进而添加了订购比萨、预订票务、开灯和打电话的功能。我们很快将看到这些机器人与健康和健身设备连接，以便帮助人们制定更好的锻炼计划并记得服药。它们还将控制洗碗机和微波炉，追踪冰箱里剩余的物品，并在紧急情况下呼叫救护车。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Google and Amazon have both opened up their devices to third-party developers - who in turn have added the abilities to order pizza , book tickets , turn on lights and make phone calls . source: A federal-state team of inspectors prepares a damage survey report that is used by FEMA to calculate how much is owed an agency under the law . After Loma Prieta , FEMA received 762 applications for assistance -- 330 from private nonprofit agencies . source: A summer-long dispute between Clayton County and Atlanta over police jurisdiction at Hartsfield International Airport ended Thursday , according to Clayton Commission Chairman Crandle Bray . Clayton narcotics officers have been issued security clearance to conduct investigations at the airport , working independently of both Atlanta and federal drug agents . Clayton officers had been denied access to the airport after the county withdrew from a drug task force operated by the DEA .

source: Andy and I had honeymooned here in 1982 and promised ourselves that someday we would return . That was three children and what seems like a lifetime ago . I was excited but nervous , too . As we bounced along the rutted road for 45 minutes after midnight through a rain forest , I wondered if the place could possibly match our romantic memories . Unlike many couples , we 'd truly had a perfect honeymoon - basking in the sun , dancing under the stars , eating drawn-out gourmet meals amid hibiscus and bougainvillea .
domestication: 1982年，安迪和我在这里度过了蜜月，并且发誓将来一定要再回来。这一转眼就是三个孩子的光景，仿佛过去了一辈子。这次回来，我既兴奋又紧张。午夜过后，我们在雨林里颠簸了45分钟，我不禁想，这地方还能像我们记忆中的那么浪漫吗？我们俩的蜜月确实完美无缺，晒太阳、在星空下跳舞、在夹竹桃和九重葛中享用漫长的美食，好不惬意。不像许多夫妻，我们的蜜月真的可以称得上是完美的。

Unlike many couples , we 'd truly had a perfect honeymoon - basking in the sun , dancing under the stars , eating drawn-out gourmet meals amid hibiscus and bougainvillea .
